brand.name: Faxr Mebel
footer.desc: A harmony of elegance and luxury. We combine the traditions of national furniture craftsmanship with modern architectural minimalism to create truly perfect furniture.
footer.newsletterDesc: Be the first to know about new premium designs and exclusive offers.

home.teaser1.desc: Walnut wood and custom lighting system
home.teaser2.title: Oak Dining Table
home.teaser2.desc: Set of tables made of natural oak wood
home.testimonial.text: "Faxr Mebel brings not just furniture, but real luxury and elegance to your home. The quality of Italian velvet is absolutely outstanding."
home.testimonial.name: Elena V.
materials.title: Quality of Natural
materials.desc: We select only eco-friendly natural wood trunks and luxurious Italian fabrics for every order.
materials.wood.title: Premium Wood Selection
materials.fabric.title: Luxurious Upholstery Fabrics
materials.fabric.customDesc: You can also order furniture with any other type or color of fabric. We offer more than 200 fabrics imported from Italy, Turkey and Belgium.
wood.walnut.name: Walnut
wood.walnut.description: Dark color, ultra-durable texture and luxurious glossy surface — wood of the highest grade.
wood.oak.name: Oak
wood.oak.description: Light sandy and golden tones, highly moisture-resistant and a classic choice serving for centuries.
wood.birch.name: Birch
wood.birch.description: Smooth, light-colored and flexible wood. Ideal for modern Scandinavian minimalist furniture.
fabric.velvet.name: Italian Velvet
fabric.velvet.description: Soft, luxurious texture and easy-to-clean premium fabric. Gives a elegant glossy effect.
fabric.leather.name: Full-grain Leather
fabric.leather.description: Natural Italian leather. Develops an even more beautiful character over time and is highly durable.
featured.title: Popular Collections.
featured.desc: Specially selected furniture pieces for your luxurious living space.
showroom.title: Our Showroom.
showroom.desc: Feel the softness of our premium fabrics, take a close look at the quality of hand-polished wood, and get a free consultation from our professional furniture designers.
about.heritage.title: Values and
about.heritage.desc: Faxr Mebel is not just a brand, it is a harmony of wood carving art passed down from generation to generation and modern European minimalism.
about.story.title: Seeking perfection —
about.story.desc: We treat every chair, sofa or table as a work of art. All processes, from selecting wood to its final polishing, are performed by the hands of our master artisans.
about.story.stat1.title: 30 Years of Tradition
about.story.stat2.title: Premium Design
about.timeline.title: Our Path of
about.timeline.step1.title: First Step
about.timeline.step1.desc: A small carpentry workshop was established by our forefather artisans, laying the foundation for the art of hand-polished wood carving.
about.timeline.step2.title: Expansion
about.timeline.step2.desc: Furniture production lines and upholstery services were introduced. Our products gained recognition at national exhibitions.
about.timeline.step3.title: Minimalism Fusion
about.timeline.step3.desc: A new style of minimalism was introduced to the Uzbek market, merging modern European architecture and Italian luxury designs.
about.timeline.step4.title: Global Pride
about.timeline.step4.desc: We turned into a world-class luxury brand with a digital premium platform, Telegram integration and eco-friendly top-grade wood.
about.team.title: Our Skilled Artisans.
about.team.desc: Meet the individuals standing behind the beauty and durability of our furniture.
about.artisan.rustam.bio: Master carver with 30 years of experience. Personally responsible for selecting, cutting and hand-polishing every piece of walnut and oak.
about.artisan.kamola.bio: Graduate of the Italian Academy of Design. Creator of the color palette, aesthetic harmony and minimalist lines of Faxr Mebel collections.
about.artisan.diyor.bio: Master of working with velvet, silk and genuine leather. Ensures the perfection and durability of every furniture stitching.
about.footer.title: We bring pride into homes, not just furniture.
about.footer.desc: Our highest reward is that each of our furniture masterpieces keeps its durability for centuries and causes admiration in every guest.
contact.hero.title: Contact
contact.hero.desc: Want to consult with our leading designers or visit our showroom? We are ready to provide you with luxury assistance.

contact.faq.title: Frequently Asked
contact.faq.q1.q: Can furniture be ordered according to custom sizes?
contact.faq.q1.a: Yes, of course! We design furniture from scratch according to our clients' apartment sizes and special design requirements.
contact.faq.q2.a: Within the city of Tashkent, delivery and assembly/installation of all types of large furniture are completely free of charge (Luxe Service).
contact.faq.q3.q: How long is the warranty on furniture?
contact.faq.q3.a: We guarantee a full 3-year warranty and lifetime service on all of our premium wood and velvet/leather upholstered furniture.
contact.faq.q4.q: How long does it take for orders to be ready?
contact.faq.q4.a: Our standard furniture is ready within 7 to 15 working days, while complex and custom orders are manufactured in 20-25 working days.
shop.hero.title: Exclusive
shop.bespoke.title: Need a Special Order?
shop.bespoke.desc: Our skilled craftsmen can manufacture exclusive furniture tailored to your custom sizes and individual project.
